name: explore
description: Read-only senior architect-advisor: charts a codebase into a durable system design reference (diagrams, ADRs, risk map); feature flags add audit-and-plan, security review, executor dispatch, and budget-aware resumable runs.
skillInstructions:
Kimi Code tool mapping for the explore skill:

- When the skill says to dispatch a read-only exploration subagent (Phase 2 lens work), use Kimi Code's `Agent` tool with `subagent_type: "explore"`.
- When the skill dispatches the executor under --execute-level, use `Agent` with `subagent_type: "coder"` and paste the full plan text plus the executor preamble into `prompt`.
- When the skill refers to the usage signal (/usage, /context), use whatever quota or context indicator Kimi Code exposes; if none exists, follow the skill's fixed-cap fallback in references/sub-continuous.md.
- Use Kimi Code's `Read`, `Grep`, `Glob`, `Bash`, `FetchURL`, and `TodoList` tools by their exposed names for the corresponding actions.
- When the skill refers to the `Skill` tool, use Kimi Code's native `Skill` tool.

interface.shortDescription: Read-only architect-advisor: system design reference, audits, and executable plans
